Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3
In this training, Dean is going to share with you the philosophy of marketing your small group, workshop or mastermind. This video will help you
find your voice, find your passion and find out how you position your event to potential students. This will give you a jump start on the
competition when it comes to selling people on your event.
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Understand that we are in the information age. $3,300 is spent every second on information products.
Be able to articulate that masterminds don’t cost you time but in fact give you a return on your time.
Pre-frame people to understand that masterminds can give you 1-3 ideas that can have a massive effect on your business’ ROI. You
can’t afford NOT to be in a group, workshop or mastermind.
After you overcome their objections, tell them what you are going to teach at the group, workshops or masterminds.
After you overcome their objectives, tell them what you’re going to teach, then let them know of your superpower and how you are
going to get them from point A to point B.

After all of that, paint a picture of the biggest benefits someone will get from being in your small group, workshop or mastermind.
Practice your sales philosophy by sharing with friends and family the power of small groups, workshops and masterminds and why
yours will be so life-changing for people.
